name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agent or improvement to an existing one
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is this a new agent or an improvement to an existing one?

- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Improvement to: `devils-advocate-___________`

## Problem

What issue does this address? What does the current set of agents miss?

## Proposed domain / improvement

Describe what the new agent should critique, or what the existing agent should do differently.

## Example violations it should catch

Provide 2-3 concrete examples of code problems this agent should flag.

```
// Example 1: ...

// Example 2: ...
```

## Example non-violations it should NOT flag

What should it explicitly ignore to avoid false positives?
